blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,356 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
